Premium lawn care & landscaping

Deep green lawns. Clean edges. A premium finish, every visit.

EmeraldEdge delivers consistent weekly maintenance, seasonal plans, and detail-first installs—built for curb appeal and peace of mind.

Get a Quote View Services
Licensed & insured Clear pricing Seasonal plans
finish score0

Services

Detail-first work for lawns that look expensive.

Weekly care, seasonal resets, and clean installs—built around consistency and crisp finishing.

Precision Mowing

Crisp stripe lines, clean perimeter cuts, and consistent weekly/biweekly schedules.

Edging & Trimming

Hard-edge definition along walks, beds, and driveways—no frayed borders.

Mulch & Beds

Fresh color, clean lines, and tidy plant spacing that reads premium from the curb.

Seasonal Cleanups

Spring refresh, fall leaf work, storm debris—handled fast and left spotless.

Aeration & Overseed

Healthier turf density and deeper roots with seasonal timing and plan guidance.

Landscape Installs

Stone edging, small hardscape accents, and planting installs with clean finishes.

Why us

Premium standards—without the premium hassle.

Licensed & insured

Clear coverage, tidy crews, and professional site standards.

On-time arrivals

Scheduled windows with reliable communication—no guessing.

Clear pricing

Transparent tiers and add-ons so expectations stay aligned.

Seasonal plans

Proactive maintenance that keeps landscapes sharp year-round.

Process

From request to follow-up—clean, simple, predictable.

  1. RequestSend a quick note or call. Tell us what “perfect” looks like.
  2. VisitWe walk the property, confirm scope, and identify edge-case details.
  3. ServiceA consistent crew delivers clean lines, trimmed edges, and tidy paths.
  4. Follow-upWe confirm the finish, share notes, and schedule the next visit.

Featured projects

Work that reads premium from the street.

Clean Edge Refresh

Front-yard redefinition with crisp borders, fresh mulch, and refined bed lines.

Backyard Stripe Set

Weekly mowing pattern and detail trim package for a premium look all season.

Seasonal Cleanup Reset

Storm debris removal, leaf cleanup, and edging for a “ready-for-guests” finish.

Areas served

Local routes with reliable timing.
